channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the US
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the US — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The Map of Longing — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Just released — verdict soon — Before her death, Lucy creates a game for her sister, Greta, pushing her into a journey of self-discovery — and toward the charming Will Tucker.

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: Obsession — Peacock Premium
item.description: Peacock Premium · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…

item.title: Borderline — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · Just released — verdict soon — Convinced they are our secret saviors, rogue U.S. operatives abduct Mexican gang members and seed them across major American cities, unleashing criminal chaos,…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Salcedo, Leather, and Boogaloo — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet — Martín Salcedo is rarely swept off his feet — until Verónica Pinilla and Quiebra Canto turn up the party, booze and danger.

item.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet — This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

item.title: I'm Not Afraid — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 8.7 · Must watch — 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.7 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Hulu
item.description: Hulu · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Young Washington — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: I Know Who You Are — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — On 1949 October 1, the day of the founding ceremony of the People's Republic of China, Xiao Dali enters the city and is reorganized as the director of the…

item.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Rebirth — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Japanese · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — Originally a collection of clips from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, Death was created as a precursor to the re-worked ending of the series.
